title: .zero-two-one.json install manifest
description: Install manifest written to a target repo root by the Init v2 engine (spec 001). Extends TDD §7 with additive fields updatedAt and merged (flagged TDD follow-up).

version.description: Package version at install / last upgrade.

installedAt.description: First-install timestamp. Written once, preserved across re-runs/upgrades.

updatedAt.description: Additive. Refreshed on every re-run/--upgrade. Absent until the first re-run.

mode.description: spec 001 writes 'scaffold' and 'source'; 'migrate' is a sibling spec.

stack.description: Not defaulted — supplied by the AI assistant driving init.

files.description: Framework-owned files only. relpath -> sha256 of LF-normalized content.

merged.description: Additive. Entries the framework contributed per merged file, so user deletions are respected on re-run.
